title: Departure Of The Good Daemon
content:
What can I do in poetry,
Now the good spirit's gone from me?
Why, nothing now but lonely sit
And over-read what I have writ.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Departure Of The Good Daemon", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
